MASTER CALENDAR JURY

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-10-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Fred Bryant, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff.
Arnold Walter Evje representing the plaintiff.

Defendant Jeffrey Hill is present.
William Tarantino representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions. Case settled. Judgment Pursuant to Stipulation was submitted for court filing.

The trial date of December 15, 2008 is vacated.

Judge Pro Tem Will Chen, Clerk Maria Olopernes-Pena, Not Reported. (218)
